title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 11.030 - State manual information on state officers and employees
text:
11.030.  State manual information on state officers and employees. — There shall be published in the manual the name, salary and home or office address of every officer and employee of this state, and it is unlawful for any officer of this state to pay or authorize the payment of a salary to any appointee or employee until such person files with the secretary of state, for publication in the manual, the name, salary, and home or office address of the employee.
(RSMo 1939 § 15002, A.L. 1941 p. 690, A.L. 1957 p. 726, A.L. 1985 S.B. 383, A.L. 1994 H.B. 1248 & 1048) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13809
